description: First fully successful cross-contract run of the mesh: Registry lookup confirmed, SecurityAgent.execute() triggers a real non-det LLM call, emits its result to Aggregator via submit_result(), which auto-finalizes and deterministically aggregates since only one submission was expected.

steps.purpose: Confirm all 3 agents self-registered correctly before running any execute() calls
Register the task manifest before any agent reports a result
Whitelist SecurityAgent as the sole expected reporter for task_id=1

steps.action: SecurityAgent.execute(task_id=1, task_description='Review this DeFi lending pool before listing: high leverage, no timelock on admin functions, TVL just crossed $2M', capability='security-audit', aggregator_address=Aggregator)
steps.purpose: Trigger the real non-det LLM call (run_nondet_unsafe + exec_prompt) and emit() the result to Aggregator

equivalence_principle_output.summary: High leverage and lack of timelock on admin functions introduce significant centralization and manipulation risks. TVL of $2M amplifies potential losses.

steps.purpose: Confirm the emit()-triggered submit_result() landed, the task auto-finalized, and aggregation logic ran correctly

result.summary: [security-audit] high: High leverage and lack of timelock on admin functions introduce significant centralization and manipulation risks. TVL of $2M amplifies potential losses.

submissions.summary: High leverage and lack of timelock on admin functions introduce significant centralization and manipulation risks. TVL of $2M amplifies potential losses.

architectural_checks_confirmed: Agent has zero knowledge of Coordinator — execute() was called directly with no coordinator involved
Aggregator auto-finalized as soon as len(submissions) >= expected_count (1), without any external trigger
No capability conflict (single submission) -> deterministic aggregation path taken, not the LLM fallback
'high' verdict correctly escalated to 'flagged' via the negative_verdicts rule
Address round-tripped correctly end-to-end using the .as_hex convention (agent_address in submissions matches the deployed SecurityAgent address exactly)
Result reached Aggregator exclusively through emit()->submit_result(), no external channel

summary.note: First confirmed full mesh hop: Registry -> single Agent -> Aggregator. Coordinator not yet exercised in this run; ResearchAgent and FinanceAgent chains pending with task_id=2 and task_id=3.
